_comment: Copy this to secrets.local.json (gitignored) and fill in your own values. device_id + device_password are your PERSONAL companion credentials (recovered from a decrypted capture of the app's POST /2/devices/register). refresh_token is an alternative personal credential. client_id/client_secret are app-global (baked into the Weber APK, identical for every install) and are already embedded in the integration's const.py — fill them here only if a tool asks for them. appliance_id/session_id are your hub/cook identifiers, used by the dev tools in tools/.
